title: Subagents, Parallelism, and Coordination · Control-Loop Lens: Coordination Cost
summary: Coordinate specialist agents without duplicate or conflicting work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops coordination cost increment in a bounded multi-agent execution map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare parallel speedup with communication, merge, and review cost.
Verify subagent claims and integrate evidence rather than concatenating outputs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
